text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Air Shakur and I are discussing her
schedule going forward in my office.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
To make a long story short, things're gonna get
even tougher from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I need to be even more efficient than before or
else it's game over.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll get Parcae to simulate a training program
that'll eliminate inefficiency.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to look at my past notes to help organize
my thoughts. I go to open my desk drawer, and
when I do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flutter.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, you dropped somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What do I find on the floor but the hot spring
vacation coupon I won some time ago?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You still haven't used that?
choice_data_list: There hasn't been a good time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The real reason is because I completely forgot
about it. I'd originally entered the raffle, hoping
to give the coupon to Air Shakur, but she didn't
want it, so it's been collecting dust all this time.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You don't want it?
choice_data_list:
Well, things are going to be busy for a while,
so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering how tense Air Shakur has been, I
don't think it'd be in good taste to go off and
relax on my own.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, why don't we just go now before things start
to ramp up?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We go now, get it over with, and come back.
Forget the whole overnight stay part, though. I'm
not havin' any of that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That should put you at ease, right? Then, get
your things so we can get goin'.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh. This place isn't too shabby.
choice_data_list:
I reserved a bath for private use, so please feel
free to use it.

I reserved a bath for private use, so please feel
free to use it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Yeah, sure...
choice_data_list: Were you not planning to go in?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Meh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well. I guess if no one else'll be around since you
reserved it and everything...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: All right. I'll see you later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What, you're done already?
choice_data_list:
Yeah, I get dizzy if I stay in the hot water too
long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's only half the truth. The main reason was
because I didn't want Air Shakur to wait on me,
but I don't bring that part up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, okay.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head back to the station. The breeze is lovely
as it blows past us and cools our warm bodies
down.
choice_data_list: Thanks for coming along with me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Yup.
choice_data_list: Oh, you accepted my thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well... I did agree to come.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: For your sake.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe in exceptions or outliers. I keep
our relationship at the bare minimum.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But this was also necessary in order to hit the
reset button on us.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: These past three years've been crazy long.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll admit our relationship's changed since we first
started workin' together.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I even feel like I get you sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not like that's actually possible, though. I'm not
here to understand anyone or to be understood.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But if we're gonna keep workin' together, we
gotta ditch all the preconceived notions we've
got about each other.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm what?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought I told you to quit it with that kinda
stuff.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But what?
choice_data_list: It's all right if I try to help you again, right?
It's all right if I try to help you again, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not like you'd stop even if I told you to...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: C'mon. We're gonna miss the train at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Air Shakur and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
